2605.24062.title: Federated Learning over Human-Body Communication for On-Body Edge Intelligence: A Survey, Taxonomy, and BODYFED-HBC Scheduling Vignette
2605.24062.paper_summary: Human-body communication (HBC) is a promising physical substrate for wearable body-area networks because it can localize communication around the body and reduce the burden of conventional radio links. Federated learning (FL) is a promising learning substrate because it can reduce raw-data centralization for physiological and behavioral sensing. Yet these two literatures remain weakly connected: FL for wearables usually abstracts the communication layer, whereas HBC research usually abstracts learning and model-update traffic. This article surveys the intersection of HBC, wireless body-area networks, wearable FL, Internet-of-Bodies privacy, and edge-intelligence optimization. We propose a taxonomy that distinguishes intra-body, body-hub, cross-user, and clinical-cloud FL deployments, and we identify the open problem of body-channel-aware FL: learning protocols whose client selection, update compression, and aggregation are controlled by posture-dependent HBC links, residual energy, sensor memory, and privacy risk. To make the research agenda concrete, we introduce BODYFED-HBC as a reference architecture and provide an optimization formulation and scheduling algorithm. We further specify a reproducible simulation vignette that combines public wearable datasets with empirical body-coupled-communication signal-loss models. The article concludes with open datasets, evaluation metrics, limitations, and research directions for computer scientists working above the hardware layer.
2605.24062.paper_summary_zh: 人體通信（HBC）是一種有前景的可穿戴身體區域網絡的物理基礎，因為它可以在身體周圍本地化通信並減少傳統無線鏈路的負擔。聯邦學習（FL）是一種有前景的學習基礎，因為它可以減少生理和行為感測的原始數據集中化。 然而，這兩個文獻之間的聯繫仍然較弱：可穿戴設備的 FL 通常抽象化通信層，而 HBC 研究通常抽象化學習和模型更新流量。 本文調查了 HBC、無線身體區域網絡、可穿戴 FL、身體互聯網隱私和邊緣智能優化的交集。我們提出了一個分類法，區分了體內、身體中心、跨用戶和臨床雲 FL 部署，並確定了身體通道感知 FL 的開放問題：學習協議，其客戶端選擇、更新壓縮和聚合由姿勢依賴的 HBC 鏈路、剩餘能量、傳感器記憶和隱私風險控制。 為了使研究議程具體化，我們引入了 BODYFED-HBC 作為參考架構，並提供了優化公式和調度算法。我們進一步指定了一個可重複的模擬小品，該小品結合了公共可穿戴數據集和實證的身體耦合通信信號損失模型。 本文以開放數據集、評估指標、限制和計算機科學家在硬體層之上工作的研究方向作結。
2605.24062.author: Koffka Khan et.al.
